hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was modified.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Sequence number of the import that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: ownerId
hasAttributes.description: Owner Id

hasAttributes.name: ownerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of owner, either User or Team.

hasAttributes.name: owningBusinessUnit
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the business unit that owns the record

hasAttributes.name: owningUser
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user that owns the activity.

hasAttributes.name: owningTeam
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the team that owns the record.

hasAttributes.name: timeZoneRuleVersionNumber
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: UTCConversionTimeZoneCode
hasAttributes.description: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: versionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Version Number

hasAttributes.name: goalId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for entity instances

hasAttributes.name: stateCode
hasAttributes.description: Status of the Goal

hasAttributes.name: statusCode
hasAttributes.description: Reason for the status of the Goal

hasAttributes.name: title
hasAttributes.description: Type a title or name that describes the goal.

hasAttributes.name: fiscalPeriod
hasAttributes.description: Select the fiscal period for the goal.

hasAttributes.name: fiscalYear
hasAttributes.description: Select the fiscal year for the goal that's being tracked.

hasAttributes.name: goalStartDate
hasAttributes.description: The date after which the goal should begin being pursued.

hasAttributes.name: goalEndDate
hasAttributes.description: Enter the date when the goal ends.

hasAttributes.name: goalOwnerId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the user or team responsible for meeting the goal.

hasAttributes.name: goalOwnerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The name of the entity linked by goalOwnerId

hasAttributes.name: parentGoalId
hasAttributes.description: Choose a parent goal if the current goal is a child goal. This sets up a parent-child relationship for reporting and analytics.

hasAttributes.name: transactionCurrencyId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the local currency for the record to make sure budgets are reported in the correct currency.

hasAttributes.name: exchangeRate
hasAttributes.description: Shows the conversion rate of the record's currency. The exchange rate is used to convert all money fields in the record from the local currency to the system's default currency.

hasAttributes.name: metricId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the metric for the goal. This metric determines how the goal is tracked.

hasAttributes.name: treeId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the goal tree.

hasAttributes.name: depth
hasAttributes.description: Depth of the goal in the tree.

hasAttributes.name: stretchTargetMoney
hasAttributes.description: Select stretch target (money) of the goal to define a higher or difficult level of goal than the usual ones.

hasAttributes.name: stretchTargetMoneyBase
hasAttributes.description: Shows the stretch target (money) in base currency to indicate a higher or difficult level of goal than the usual ones.

hasAttributes.name: stretchTargetDecimal
hasAttributes.description: Select a stretch target (decimal) of the goal to define a higher or difficult level of goal than the usual ones.

hasAttributes.name: stretchTargetInteger
hasAttributes.description: Select the stretch target (integer) of the goal to define a higher or difficult level of goal than the usual ones.

hasAttributes.name: targetMoney
hasAttributes.description: Select a goal target (money) to track a monetary amount such as revenue from a product.

hasAttributes.name: targetMoneyBase
hasAttributes.description: Shows the goal target of the money type in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: targetDecimal
hasAttributes.description: Select a goal target of the decimal type to use for tracking data that include partial numbers, such as pounds sold of a product sold by weight.

hasAttributes.name: targetInteger
hasAttributes.description: Select a goal target of the integer type to use for tracking anything countable in whole numbers, such as units sold.

hasAttributes.name: actualMoney
hasAttributes.description: Shows the actual value (Money type) achieved towards the target as of the last rolled-up date. This field appears when the metric type of the goal is Amount and the amount data type is Money.

hasAttributes.name: actualMoneyBase
hasAttributes.description: Shows the actual value (money type) in base currency to track goal results against the target.

hasAttributes.name: customRollupFieldMoney
hasAttributes.description: Indicates a placeholder rollup field for a money value to track a third category of results other than actuals and in-progress results.

hasAttributes.name: customRollupFieldMoneyBase
hasAttributes.description: Indicates a placeholder rollup field for a money value in base currency to track a third category of results other than actuals and in-progress results.

hasAttributes.name: inProgressMoney
hasAttributes.description: Shows the in-progress value (money) against the target. This value could contribute to a goal, but is not counted yet as actual.

hasAttributes.name: inProgressMoneyBase
hasAttributes.description: Shows the in-progress value (money) in base currency to track goal results against the target.

hasAttributes.name: actualDecimal
hasAttributes.description: Shows the actual value (Decimal type) achieved towards the target as of the last rolled-up date. This field appears when the metric type of the goal is Amount and the amount data type is Decimal.

hasAttributes.name: customRollupFieldDecimal
hasAttributes.description: Indicates a placeholder rollup field for a decimal value to track a third category of results other than actuals and in-progress results.

hasAttributes.name: inProgressDecimal
hasAttributes.description: Shows the in-progress value (decimal) against the target. This value could contribute to a goal, but is not counted yet as actual.

hasAttributes.name: actualInteger
hasAttributes.description: Shows the actual value (integer) achieved towards the target as of the last rolled-up date. This field appears when the metric type of the goal is Amount or Count and the amount data type is Integer.

hasAttributes.name: customRollupFieldInteger
hasAttributes.description: Indicates a placeholder rollup field for an integer value to track a third category of results other than actuals and in-progress results.

hasAttributes.name: inProgressInteger
hasAttributes.description: Shows the in-progress value (integer) against the target. This value could contribute to a goal, but is not counted yet as actual.

hasAttributes.name: percentage
hasAttributes.description: Shows the percentage achieved against the target goal.

hasAttributes.name: isFiscalPeriodGoal
hasAttributes.description: Select whether the goal period is a fiscal period or custom period.

hasAttributes.name: considerOnlyGoalOwnersRecords
hasAttributes.description: Select whether only the goal owner's records, or all records, should be rolled up for goal results.

hasAttributes.name: lastRolledupDate
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the goal was last rolled up. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

hasAttributes.name: targetString
hasAttributes.description: Target value of the goal.

hasAttributes.name: stretchTargetString
hasAttributes.description: Stretch target value for all data types.

hasAttributes.name: actualString
hasAttributes.description: Actual Value of the goal.

hasAttributes.name: customRollupFieldString
hasAttributes.description: Placeholder rollup field for the goal.

hasAttributes.name: inProgressString
hasAttributes.description: In-progress value of the goal.

hasAttributes.name: amountDataType
hasAttributes.description: Data type of the amount.

hasAttributes.name: isAmount
hasAttributes.description: Indicates whether the metric type is Count or Amount.

hasAttributes.name: rollupQueryActualIntegerId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the query that will be used to calculate the actual data for the goal (integer).

hasAttributes.name: rollUpQueryActualMoneyId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the query that will be used to calculate the actual data for the goal (money).

hasAttributes.name: rollUpQueryActualDecimalId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the query that will be used to calculate the actual data for the goal (decimal).

hasAttributes.name: rollUpQueryCustomIntegerId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the query that will be used to calculate data for the custom rollup field (integer).

hasAttributes.name: rollUpQueryCustomMoneyId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the query that will be used to calculate data for the custom rollup field (money).

hasAttributes.name: rollUpQueryCustomDecimalId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the query that will be used to calculate data for the custom rollup field (decimal).

hasAttributes.name: rollUpQueryInprogressIntegerId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the query that will be used to calculate data for the in-progress rollup field (integer).

hasAttributes.name: rollUpQueryInprogressMoneyId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the query that will be used to calculate data for the in-progress rollup field (money).

hasAttributes.name: rollUpQueryInprogressDecimalId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the query that will be used to calculate data for the in-progress rollup field (decimal).

hasAttributes.name: rollupOnlyFromChildGoals
hasAttributes.displayName: Roll Up Only from Child Goals
hasAttributes.description: Select whether the data should be rolled up only from the child goals.

hasAttributes.name: goalWithErrorId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the goal that caused an error in the rollup of the goal hierarchy.

hasAttributes.name: rollupErrorCode
hasAttributes.description: Error code associated with rollup.

hasAttributes.name: computedTargetAsOfTodayPercentageAchieved
hasAttributes.description: Shows the expected value for percentage achieved against the target goal as of the current date.

hasAttributes.name: computedTargetAsOfTodayMoney
hasAttributes.description: Shows the expected amount for actual value (money type) against the target goal as of the current date.

hasAttributes.name: computedTargetAsOfTodayMoneyBase
hasAttributes.description: Shows the expected amount in base currency for actual value (money type) against the target goal as of the current date.

hasAttributes.name: computedTargetAsOfTodayDecimal
hasAttributes.description: Shows the expected amount for actual value (decimal type) against the target goal.

hasAttributes.name: computedTargetAsOfTodayInteger
hasAttributes.description: Shows the expected amount for actual value (integer type) against the target goal as of the current date.

hasAttributes.name: isOverride
hasAttributes.description: Indicates whether the values of system rollup fields can be updated.

hasAttributes.name: isOverridden
hasAttributes.description: Select whether the system rollup fields are updated. If set to Yes, the next system rollup will not update the values of the rollup fields with the system calculated values.

hasAttributes.name: entityImageId
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

definitions.description: Target objective for a user or a team for a specified time period.
